basic_details.job_title: FAGMIL Expert Recruitment 2026 - Apply Walkin for 31 Senior and Middle Level Posts
basic_details.organization_name: FCI Aravali Gypsum and Minerals India Limited (FAGMIL)
basic_details.job_category: Government of India Undertaking, Mini Ratna Category-II
basic_details.post_name: Senior Expert, Middle Level Expert, Expert, Middle Level Expert (Liaison)
basic_details.short_information: FCI Aravali Gypsum and Minerals India Limited (FAGMIL), a Government of India Undertaking (Mini Ratna Category-II), has announced a walk-in interview to engage various Experts on contract basis vide Advertisement No. FAGMIL/EXPERTS/2026. A total of 31 posts are on offer across Senior Expert, Middle Level Expert, Expert, and Middle Level Expert (Liaison) categories in Geology, Geophysics, Chemistry, and Hydrogeology streams. This article covers the complete FAGMIL Recruitment 2026 notification, including eligibility, age limit, salary, selection process, documents required, and how to attend th

important_dates.raw: Walk-in Interview Date: 28 July 2026 (Tuesday) Registration Time: 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM (same day, same venue) - registration after 12:00 PM will not be permitted. | The notification does not mention a separate online application start or end date, since this is a walk-in interview process and applicants report in person with a filled application form.

qualification.details: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All qualifications must be from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates against whom a criminal case is pending in a court of law need not apply. Candidates must have basic knowledge of Computers, MS Office, and relevant specialized software. For the Liaison post specifically, the candidate should be a retired employee of a central government/autonomous or statutory body, having served not less than three years at the level of Section Officer/Senior Official (up to DGM level); preference is given to candidates with work experience with various Ministries in Delhi.

salary_details.details: The engagement is on a contract basis initially for 11 months, which may be reviewed by the management for extension subject to requirement and suitability.

selection_process: Selection is made purely through a Walk-In Interview. No written examination or online application process is mentioned in the notification. Candidates must:

Bring a typed application form on A-4 size paper in the prescribed format along with all relevant documents. Register between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM on the interview date; registration will not be allowed after 12:00 PM. Produce original documents for verification before being permitted to attend the interview.
engagement is strictly on an "as and when required" basis
depending on operational necessity and project sanction under NMET norms. The actual number of experts deployed may vary
and this engagement does not confer any right to regular appointment.
how_to_apply: Download/prepare the prescribed Application Format and type it on A-4 size paper.
Fill in personal details, address, academic and professional qualifications, and experience details as per the format.
Affix a recent passport-size photograph on the form.
Attach original documents plus self-attested photocopies for verification.

Report to FAGMIL, Plot No. 2, West Patel Nagar, Circuit House Road, Ratanada, Jodhpur (Rajasthan) 342011 on 28 July 2026 (Tuesday) between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM for registration and the walk-in interview.
No online application process is mentioned in the notification; the process is entirely walk-in based.

content_sections.heading: FAGMIL Expert Recruitment 2026 Important Dates 2026
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview Date: 28 July 2026 (Tuesday) Registration Time: 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM (same day, same venue) - registration after 12:00 PM will not be permitted. The notification does not mention a separate online application start or end date, since this is a walk-in interview process and applicants report in person with a filled application form.

content_sections.heading: FAGMIL Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All qualifications must be from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates against whom a criminal case is pending in a court of law need not apply. Candidates must have basic knowledge of Computers, MS Office, and relevant specialized software. For the Liaison post specifically, the candidate should be a retired employee of a central government/autonomous or statutory body, having served not less than three years at the level of Section Officer/Senior Official (up to DGM level); preference is given to candidates with work experience with various Ministries in Delhi.

content_sections.heading: FAGMIL Expert Recruitment 2026 Salary
content_sections.text: The engagement is on a contract basis initially for 11 months, which may be reviewed by the management for extension subject to requirement and suitability.

content_sections.heading: FAGMIL Expert Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is made purely through a Walk-In Interview. No written examination or online application process is mentioned in the notification. Candidates must: Bring a typed application form on A-4 size paper in the prescribed format along with all relevant documents. Register between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM on the interview date; registration will not be allowed after 12:00 PM. Produce original documents for verification before being permitted to attend the interview. Note: For Senior Expert, Middle Level Expert, and Expert posts (S.No. 1 to 3), engagement is strictly on an "as and when required" basis, depending on operational necessity and project sanction under NMET norms. The actual number of experts deployed may vary, and this engagement does not confer any right to regular appointment.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for FAGMIL Walk-In Interview
content_sections.text: Original documents/testimonials along with self-attested photocopies in support of Age, Qualification, Experience, and Category. Proof of Date of Birth as per Matriculation/10th class certificate issued by a recognized Board. Where CGPA/letter grade is awarded, a copy of the University/Institute's official conversion norms to percentage marks must also be produced (if no norms are specified, CGPA/Grade is presumed to be on a 10-point scale). Relieving order from the previous organization at the time of joining (if applicable). Recent passport-size photograph to be affixed on the application form. Documentary proof for self-employment/proprietorship experience, if claimed (GST registration, UDYAM/MSME registration, ITRs, bank statements, work orders). Candidates who do not produce/submit the required documents before the interview will not be permitted to attend the interview; the decision of FAGMIL Management is final in this regard.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for FAGMIL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download/prepare the prescribed Application Format and type it on A-4 size paper. Fill in personal details, address, academic and professional qualifications, and experience details as per the format. Affix a recent passport-size photograph on the form. Attach original documents plus self-attested photocopies for verification. Report to FAGMIL, Plot No. 2, West Patel Nagar, Circuit House Road, Ratanada, Jodhpur (Rajasthan) 342011 on 28 July 2026 (Tuesday) between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM for registration and the walk-in interview. No online application process is mentioned in the notification; the process is entirely walk-in based.

faq.question: Q1. What is FAGMIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: FAGMIL Recruitment 2026 refers to the walk-in interview conducted by FCI Aravali Gypsum and Minerals India Limited under Advt. No. FAGMIL/EXPERTS/2026 to engage 31 Experts (Senior Expert, Middle Level Expert, Expert, and Middle Level Expert Liaison) on contract basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies in FAGMIL Expert Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 31 total posts: 10 Senior Expert, 10 Middle Level Expert, 10 Expert, and 1 Middle Level Expert (Liaison).

faq.question: Q3. Is there an online application process for FAGMIL Expert posts?
faq.answer: No. The notification specifies engagement only through a walk-in interview; candidates must bring a typed application form on A-4 paper directly to the venue.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for FAGMIL Expert posts?
faq.answer: The normal maximum age limit is 60 years, extendable up to 70 years in rare/exceptional cases with CMD approval. Candidates above 69 years may apply but will only be engaged for the residual contract period until they turn 70.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for FAGMIL Senior Expert, Middle Level Expert, and Expert posts?
faq.answer: Senior Expert: Rs. 55,000/- per month; Middle Level Expert and Middle Level Expert (Liaison): Rs. 45,000/- per month; Expert: Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates above 60 years apply for FAGMIL Expert posts?
faq.answer: Yes, but candidates aged 60 and above must submit a medical fitness certificate at the time of the interview, and engagement beyond 60 requires CMD approval in rare/exceptional cases.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required at the FAGMIL walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Original documents with self-attested photocopies for age, qualification, experience, and category, along with a recent passport-size photograph and, if applicable, proof of self-employment experience or CGPA conversion norms.

faq.question: Q8. Who is eligible for the FAGMIL Middle Level Expert (Liaison) post?
faq.answer: A graduate in any discipline from a recognized university who is a retired employee of a central government/autonomous/statutory body, having served at least three years at the level of Section Officer/Senior Official (up to DGM level), with preference for candidates having experience with ministries in Delhi.
